description_long: This is a rectangular table with a flat, wood-textured top and four straight, black metal legs positioned at each corner. The tabletop has a natural wood grain pattern, giving it a warm and inviting appearance suitable for communal or work settings. The legs are simple and functional, providing sturdy support without any decorative embellishments. The table's design is minimalist and modern, making it versatile for use in parks, outdoor seating areas, or urban plazas. The surface appears smooth and hard, ideal for supporting various objects or activities. There are no visible drawers, handles, or additional features beyond the tabletop and legs.
description: A modern rectangular table with a wood-grain top and four black metal legs, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood-textured tabletop and two black legs at the near corners.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the tabletop and all four black legs, emphasizing the table's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the wood surface and two black legs visible at the far corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the table's length and all four legs.
